items.headline: Smoke on the Quay
items.summary: The crew traced rumors of a ghost barge through the Brass Docks.

items.headline: The Gilt Mask Auction
items.summary: A masked buyer bought silence, credit, and three missing ledgers.

items.headline: Mornqar's Ledger
items.summary: The active session is tracking a broker carrying the scarf ledger into the market.

items.headline: Bank of Ashen Notes
items.summary: The likely next session turns the market lead into vault pressure.

items.headline: Glassworks Ghost Route
items.summary: If the vault trail slips, the crew chases shipments to the glassworks.

items.headline: Cascade Parley
items.summary: A shrine contact may turn rumor into leverage if the table pivots diplomatic.

items.headline: Gunworks Blackmail
items.summary: Fallback future session if the bank trail points toward the gunworks instead.
